highlights.headline: Dodgers hang on to 2-1 win over Phillies after wild baserunning play

headlines.description: — Max Muncy hit a two-run homer, Justin Wrobleski pitched into the seventh inning and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat Zack Wheeler and the Philadelphia Phillies 2-1 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Muncy's two-run homer, Wrobleski's pitching help Dodgers defeat Wheeler, Phillies 2-1

headlines.description: — Austin Hedges and Petey Halpin hit sacrifice flies in the sixth inning as the Cleveland Guardians, a night after hitting seven homers, used small ball to beat the Minnesota Twins 5-2 on Tuesday for a third straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hedges and Halpin hit sac flies in the 6th, Guardians beat Twins 5-2 for third straight victory
